heading: Additional lands; acceptance of title
label: 396 Additional lands; acceptance of title
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized, in his discretion and upon submission of evidence of satisfactory title to him, to accept, on behalf of the United States, title to the lands referred to in as may be deemed by him necessary or desirable for national-park purposes.section 391b of this title
notes: Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National ParkDesignation of portion of Hawaii National Park situated on island of Hawaii as Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park, effective , see .Sept. 22, 1961section 391d of this title
